slash.name: Slash
slash.description: A clean strike. Scales with Attack, reduced by enemy Defense.

rusty_blade.name: Rusty Blade
rusty_blade.description: A crude swing with a dull blade. Moderate damage.

dirty_kick.name: Dirty Kick
dirty_kick.description: A cheap shot. Light damage, lowers target's Defense for 2 turns.

frenzy.name: Frenzy
frenzy.description: Whip into a fury. Raises your Attack for 2 turns.

headbutt.name: Headbutt
headbutt.description: A reckless skull-first charge. Heavy damage.

bite.name: Bite
bite.description: Sink fangs into the target. Moderate damage.

web_throw.name: Web Throw
web_throw.description: Sticky strands tangle the target. Light damage, lowers Defense for 2 turns.

pounce.name: Pounce
pounce.description: Leap and strike with full weight. Heavy damage.

skitter.name: Skitter
skitter.description: Dart around defensively. Raises your Defense for 2 turns.

firebolt.name: Firebolt
firebolt.description: Hurl a bolt of flame. Moderate damage. Scales with Magic, ignores Defense.

arcane_surge.name: Arcane Surge
arcane_surge.description: Channel raw arcane power. Raises your Magic for 2 turns.

mana_drain.name: Mana Drain
mana_drain.description: Siphon arcane energy. Light damage, lowers target's Magic for 2 turns.

hex_shield.name: Hex Shield
hex_shield.description: A shimmering ward forms. Raises your Defense for 2 turns.

shadow_bolt.name: Shadow Bolt
shadow_bolt.description: Hurl a bolt of pure shadow. Heavy damage. Scales with Magic, ignores Defense.

drain_life.name: Drain Life
drain_life.description: Pull life force from the target. Light damage, heals you for the same amount.

curse.name: Curse
curse.description: Whisper a hex. Lowers target's Attack for 2 turns.

dark_pact.name: Dark Pact
dark_pact.description: Sacrifice HP for power. Raises your Magic for 2 turns at the cost of 10 HP.

flame_breath.name: Flame Breath
flame_breath.description: Exhale a torrent of fire. Heavy damage. Scales with Magic, ignores Defense.

claw_swipe.name: Claw Swipe
claw_swipe.description: Rake with massive claws. Moderate damage.

intimidate.name: Intimidate
intimidate.description: A terrifying roar. Lowers target's Attack for 2 turns.

dragon_scales.name: Dragon Scales
dragon_scales.description: Scales harden into armor. Raises your Defense for 2 turns.
